# Pull Request Governance Check

## Required Links

- Workbook task ID/link: <!-- e.g., N-028 -->
- Linked GitHub issue: <!-- e.g., #20 -->
- Release target: <!-- e.g., v0.1 -->
- Evidence destination: <!-- workbook row / evidence link destination -->

## Impact Checks

- Source-of-truth impact: <!-- confirm workbook/Drive/repo impact and any updates needed -->
- Markdown classification check: <!-- if markdown changed, state category and why -->
- Branch classification check: <!-- feature / governance / hotfix / other -->
- CI expectation: <!-- expected workflows/checks -->
- Open blocker statement: <!-- list blockers or state "None" -->

## Completion Checklist

- [ ] I confirmed workbook updates required after merge and identified the row/task to update.
